languagePage.label: LANGUAGE
languagePage.title: Language
languagePage.description: Choose the language for the Certalytic interface. Organization settings define the default language for screening summaries and exports.
languagePage.note: Your preference is stored in a cookie on this device. API error messages from the backend remain in English.

validation.newPasswordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters

organizationPage.title: Organization
organizationPage.noOrganization: Select or create an organization to manage its settings.
